channel.title: Kristian López — Writing
channel.description: Technical articles on software architecture, microservices, AWS, Rust, Java, DDD, CQRS, and distributed systems.

item.title: Cyclomatic complexity: the metric every architect should master
item.description: Cyclomatic complexity explained for architects: what it measures, thresholds that matter, how to use it to identify refactoring targets, and when to ignore it.

item.title: Automating Git workflows with advanced bash scripts
item.description: Production-grade bash scripts for multi-branch Git strategies: automated rebasing, conflict detection, branch hygiene, and CI integration.

item.title: Rust microservices on AWS EKS: minimal viable config
item.description: Deploying Rust services to Amazon EKS with the minimum footprint: multi-stage Docker builds, IAM roles, S3 access, and Secrets Manager integration.

item.title: CQRS + Event Sourcing with Vert.x: a practical guide
item.description: How to implement Command Query Responsibility Segregation and Event Sourcing on the Vert.x reactive toolkit — projections, snapshots, and real-world gotchas.

item.title: Hexagonal Architecture in Java: from theory to production
item.description: A deep dive into implementing Ports & Adapters in production Java services — dependency inversion, testing strategies, and real-world trade-offs.
